steps.title: Spot the evolution and identify what explains it
steps.content: The passage opens with the claim that Barragán's career “evolved through distinct phases.” It illustrates his early Mediterranean style through the Aguilar House, then the underlined sentence appears marked by “later.” What accounts for this stated evolution?

steps.title: Verify the biographical facts account for the shift
steps.content:
The underlined sentence provides the biographical facts—extensive travels—that sparked his shift toward modernism, directly accounting for the stated transition.

The other choices misidentify its function:
  • B attributes it to project departures
  • C focuses on Mediterranean when the sentence addresses modernism
  • D cites reception information the passage never mentions


That is the correct answer.
